name: Sight Sciences, Inc.
business: Sight Sciences develops and markets interventional technologies for glaucoma and dry eye disease. Its products include the OMNI Surgical System and SION Surgical Instrument for glaucoma, and the TearCare System for dry eye disease. The company sells to ambulatory surgery centers, hospital outpatient departments, and eyecare professionals.

exposures.sentence: We offer two commercial technologies in our Interventional Glaucoma segment, our OMNI Surgical System ( OMNI ) and our SION Surgical Instrument ( SION ), both of which enable MIGS procedures.
In our interventional dry eye ("Interventional Dry Eye") segment, our commercial product line currently consists of our TearCare system.

catalysts.event: First in Human for Helix clinical study
catalysts.sentence: First in Human for Helix NCT06948773: To assess the safety of the Helix Surgical System in cataract surgery and to gain early evidence of its effectiveness in lowering intraocular pressure (IOP) in subjects with mild to moderate primary open-angle glaucoma (POAG) and cataracts

catalysts.event: First in Human for OMNI 3.0 clinical study
catalysts.sentence: First in Human for OMNI 3.0 NCT06991270: To gain early evidence of safety and assess the effectiveness of the intraocular pressure (IOP)-lowering effectiveness of the OMNI 3.0 Surgical System in primary open-angle glaucoma (POAG)

Xtend NCT07365735: In this randomized study, TearCare procedures using the TearCare MGX System (study device) with the extended Warming hold feature will be compared with TearCare procedures using the TearCare MGX System without the Warming hold (control group).

tamClaims.claim: Annual addressable U.S. market opportunity for interventional glaucoma segment is approximately $6.0 billion, with approximately $1.0 billion in the combination cataract procedure market and $5.0 billion in the standalone procedure market.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate the annual addressable U.S. market opportunity for the products in our interventional glaucoma ("Interventional Glaucoma") segment is approximately $6.0 billion with approximately $1.0 billion in the combination cataract procedure market (the Combination Cataract Market ), and $5.0 billion in the standalone procedure market (the Standalone Market ).

tamClaims.claim: U.S. market for dry eye treatments was $2.4 billion in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. market for dry eye treatments was $2.4 billion in 2025.
